/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/src/shaders.cpp.o -o OpenGLProject  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
